remarks: Charming brick condo in a desirable complex just moments from downtown New Canaan and the train station. This inviting 2-bedroom, 1 full bath home offers comfortable, easy living with a spacious living room filled with natural light and an eat-in kitchen with plenty of room for casual dining. Enjoy the convenience of being within walking distance to shops, restaurants, parks, and commuter rail service while living in a quiet, well-maintained community. *Heat & hot water included in rent, just pay electric!*
